headline: Is AXP's Platinum Refresh Delivering Stronger Engagement and Spend?
summary: American Express' Platinum Card refresh is boosting engagement and spend, with richer perks driving usage growth, though rising costs are putting pressure on margins.

headline: Assessing American Express (NYSE:AXP) Valuation After New NFL And Dining Partnerships Attract Investor Attention
summary: Recent commentary around American Express (AXP) has focused on upbeat analyst views and media attention, just as the company rolls out new multi-year partnerships across dining, sports and lifestyle experiences for its cardholder base. See our latest analysis for American Express. At a share price of US$305.73, American Express has seen short term momentum soften, with a 90 day share price return of 20.29% and a year to date share price return of 17.98%. Longer term total shareholder returns...
